summary: P1.6 Trust + Urgency Sprint - All tests PASSED. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (social-proof endpoint, purchase-survey POST/GET, funnel track new steps). Frontend: VideoRewardPreview trust block working (social proof, speed promise, risk reversal, situational urgency), PurchaseSurvey modal working (5 options, 'other' textarea, submit clears localStorage), Admin dashboard purchase-survey-summary panel working with answer breakdown. P0 features verified (no regression): instant demo, mobile sticky Video chip with ₹29, Speed SLA panel, video-cta-variants-table.
